    labelCounter attack! - Part 20 (0-0)
    titleCounter attack! - Part 20
    majorTypestatic
    nextMission0ePpNm6SoEC4f2CH-B7KKQ
    drop88qMIotyIkWBTuUav5IDsA
    keydKap0SBQEEaR1j7Ap0FNIQ
    descriptionAdmiral McArthur: “I got another mission for you in the meantime while our scientists investigates the Nexar Ships we found at the hangar. There is a planet located here in the first circle, make you way there and scan the surface.”
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionAdmiral McArthur: “Bring the data to the AF Research station located next to the Vorsran Warp Gate. While you were busy our scientist discovered a lot of useful information about Nexar Space Crafts, apparently they don’t have any life support systems. This means that the Nexar can survive at 3K and in the vacuum of space. Quite scary news… There are some good new as well, our engineers have figured out a way to add life support systems to Nexar Fighters. The downside is that the space consumed by the life support system weakens the vessels combat potential.
    addedBodies["ZdElPwi7dEirmC2ucrlQOg"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
